prestazioni: Engine swap to a **CA18DET** (88-90 JDM spec) with forged internals: CP pistons (87mm, 8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam rods, and a Tomei 264° camshaft kit for high-RPM power. Pair with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbo (0.86 A/R turbine, 60mm compressor) and a **HKS GT-SS wastegate** (1.1 bar base boost).

Full **Nismo 555** big-bore throttle body conversion (65mm) with a **SARD 60mm velocity stack** and **Tomei Type-S 4-2-1 exhaust manifold** (304 stainless, equal-length primaries). Fuel system upgrade includes **Nismo 370cc injectors** and a **Walbro 255LPH in-tank pump** with a **Z32 MAF housing** for precise airflow metering.

Chassis reinforcement with **Nismo U12-specific 4-point strut tower bar** (front) and **Cusco 2-way adjustable rear sway bar** (22mm). Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) and **Nismo reinforced lower control arms** (polyurethane bushings). Braking system features **Endless CC-R6 rotors** (280mm front, 260mm rear) with **Project Mu 999 pads** and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny U12-specific widebody kit** (Pandem Type-1, 30mm flares) with **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (carbon fiber, 1200mm span) and **Nismo U12 front lip spoiler** (JDM 90-91 spec).

OEM+ JDM styling with **Nissan S13 Silvia headlights** (HID projector retrofit) and **C-West U12 rear bumper** (dual-exit exhaust cutouts). Paint scheme: **Nismo Sonic Silver (KH3) with Gunmetal Gray (KY0) lower accents** and **Rally Art decals** (1990 Safari Rally livery replica).

Interior overhaul with **Recaro SRD seats** (U12-specific mounts) wrapped in **Nismo Alcantara (Black/Red)**, **Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel** (deep dish, 6-bolt), and **Defi BF Advance gauges** (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted in a **Nismo U12 A-pillar pod**.
